description: Create the complete Next.js project scaffold with all configuration files, Tailwind CSS setup, utility libraries, and shadcn/ui-style base components. This establishes the foundation that all page sections depend on.
steps: Create package.json with Next.js 14, React 18, Tailwind CSS 3, TypeScript, clsx, tailwind-merge, and class-variance-authority as dependencies (they won't be installed but define the project correctly)
Create tsconfig.json with Next.js-compatible settings including path aliases (@/ -> ./)
Create next.config.ts with standard Next.js configuration

Create tailwind.config.ts with custom theme extensions for colors (brand palette for BrainPal), animations (fadeIn, slideUp, slideDown, scaleIn, float, pulse-glow), and shadcn-compatible CSS variables
Create postcss.config.mjs with tailwindcss and autoprefixer plugins
Create app/globals.css with Tailwind directives (@tailwind base/components/utilities), CSS custom properties for light/dark themes (shadcn pattern), and @keyframes for all custom animations
Create lib/utils.ts with the cn() utility function (clsx + tailwind-merge pattern used by shadcn/ui)
Create lib/animations.ts with motion utility classes and animation delay helpers for staggered animations
Create components/ui/button.tsx - shadcn-style Button component using class-variance-authority pattern with variants (default, secondary, outline, ghost) and sizes (sm, default, lg)
Create components/ui/card.tsx - shadcn-style Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter components
Create components/ui/badge.tsx - shadcn-style Badge component with variants
Create components/ui/input.tsx - shadcn-style Input component for the email signup in CTA section
Create app/layout.tsx with Inter font from next/font/google, metadata for BrainPal, and globals.css import
Create a .gitignore file with standard Next.js ignores (node_modules, .next, out, etc.)
acceptance_criteria: All configuration files exist and have valid JSON/TypeScript syntax
tailwind.config.ts includes custom animation keyframes and brand colors
globals.css contains CSS custom properties for theming and @keyframes definitions
All ui components follow shadcn/ui patterns with forwardRef, className merging via cn(), and TypeScript types
app/layout.tsx properly wraps children with html/body tags and font configuration
verification: Run: find /projects/sandbox/brainpal-l2 -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.ts' | head -20 to confirm file structure

Run: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('/projects/sandbox/brainpal-l2/package.json','utf8')); console.log(Object.keys(pkg.dependencies))" to verify dependencies are declared
Visually inspect that TypeScript files have no obvious syntax errors by reading key files
findings: All 14 scaffold files created successfully. Node.js has a preload module issue (proxy-bootstrap.js not found) so direct node -e commands fail, but python3 works for JSON validation. TypeScript compilation cannot be verified without node_modules but all files have valid syntax (balanced braces/parens, correct import paths). The @/ path alias maps to ./ and all internal imports resolve correctly. External deps (react, clsx, tailwind-merge, class-variance-authority, next) will resolve after npm install.
